tasks.title: Split tui/app.rs (2856 lines) into cohesive submodules
evidence: crates/ralph/src/tui/app.rs has 2856 lines, exceeding AGENTS.md 1000 LOC limit
AGENTS.md states: Files exceeding ~1000 LOC are presumed mis-scoped and MUST be split
App struct has 50+ fields mixing concerns: filters, execution, navigation, UI state
File contains phase tracking, spinner management, filter caching, and TUI lifecycle
plan: Extract AppState struct and methods to app_state.rs (filter, selection, scroll state)
Extract phase tracking and execution state to app_execution.rs
Keep only TUI lifecycle (run_tui, prepare_tui_session) in app.rs
Update mod.rs to re-export from new submodules
Ensure no public API breakage - maintain backward compatibility
Run make ci to verify no regressions

Extract batch operations to task/batch.rs
Extract edit/update/field operations to task/edit.rs

tasks.title: Review public API surface for minimalism
